data.title: BlackRock Increases Bitcoin Holdings by $145 Million
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Arkham has reported that BlackRock's IBIT-associated addresses have acquired an additional $145 million worth of Bitcoin. This move reflects the company's ongoing interest in expanding its cryptocurrency portfolio.

data.title: Will The Price Of Bitcoin Face Downtrend Amid Market Shifts?
data.description:
The price of Bitcoin (BTC) has shown reduced volatility, registering a slight 0.23% gain in the past 24 hours. The cryptocurrency’s price movement remains subdued as market participants anticipate its next major shift. While some investors fear a bear market, others remain optimistic about Bitcoin’s long-term outlook
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/21/will-the-price-of-bitcoin-face-downtrend-amid-market-shifts/

data.title: U.S. Government Removes Tornado Cash Sanctions
data.description:
Tornado Cash was sanctioned multiple times over allegations of helping Lazarus Group launder funds. The U.S. government has now removed these sanctions, marking a significant development in the ongoing debate around crypto privacy and regulation.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/u-s-government-removes-tornado-cash-sanctions

data.title: No longer on defense, Digital Chamber names new CEO as crypto policy shifts under Trump
data.description:
As Congress plans to regulate crypto, Digital Chamber President Cody Carbone plans to step into a new role as CEO.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/347534/no-longer-on-defense-digital-chamber-names-new-ceo-as-crypto-policy-shifts-under-trump?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: ChatGPT picks 2 cryptocurrencies to add to your portfolio before March ends
data.description:
The cryptocurrency market remains highly volatile, weighed down by escalating trade tensions and broader economic uncertainty..
source: https://finbold.com/chatgpt-picks-2-cryptocurrencies-to-add-to-your-portfolio-before-march-ends/

data.title: Trump aides reportedly plan to 'leverage blockchain technology' for USAID reforms
data.description:
The Trump administration reportedly plans to reform U.S. foreign aid, including using blockchain technology to track funding.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/policy/trump-aides-reportedly-plan-to-leverage-blockchain-technology-for-usaid-reforms

data.title: Only 4 out of all 8.7M pump.fun tokens still hold $100M+ market cap
data.description:
Only four tokens out of 8.7 million launched on pump.fun since January 14, 2024, are still holding a market cap over $100 million, according to the project’s own data. Despite pulling in more than $600 million in total revenue, the vast majority of tokens created through the Solana-based meme coin launcher have either collapsed in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/4-out-of-8-7m-pump-fun-tokens-hold-100m/

data.title: The One Million Bitcoin Purchase Plan That Everybody Ignored
data.description:
Senator Cynthia Lummis' plan to buy one million Bitcoins has met with remarkable market indifference.
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/03/44440675/the-one-million-bitcoin-purchase-plan-that-everybody-ignored?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: South Korea Targets Unregistered Crypto Exchanges with Penalties
data.description:
South Korea is preparing to impose sanctions on unregistered cryptocurrency exchanges such as BitMEX and KuCoin for non-compliance with Financial Intelligence Unit regulations.
source: https://coincu.com/327834-south-korea-crypto-exchange-penalties

data.title: SEC confirms: Proof-of-Work mining isn’t a securities violation – Crypto miners rejoice!
data.description:
SEC's clarification boosts market confidence, leading to increased interest in emerging PoW altcoins.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/sec-confirms-proof-of-work-mining-isnt-a-securities-violation-crypto-miners-rejoice/
